headline: Solventum (NYSE:SOLV) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
summary: Healthcare solutions provider Solventum (NYSE:SOLV) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, but sales fell by 3% year on year to $2.01 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.48 per share was 9.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
